subject: Automatic reply: Reliable Streetwear Manufacturing for LIT Collective
body_preview:
Hello, Thanks for reaching out to LIT Collective Support. Our current response time is up to 48 hours Monday-Friday. If you have reached out to us on a weekend or bank holiday, we’ll aim to get back to you in the next two working days. We're working hard to resolve all queries as quick as possible. subject: Out Of Office Re: Exploring manufacturing partnership for Linzi's collections
body_preview:
Hi,

Thank you for your email.

I am currently on maternity leave, so I won’t be fully available
day-to-day. However, I will still be checking emails occasionally and
will do my best to pass your message on to the relevant member of my
team where needed.

If your enquiry is urgent, please include “URGENT” in the subject line
so I can ensure it reaches the right person as quickly as possible.

Alternatively please email mike@linzi.com

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regar
